title: Evangelion 30 OST out
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 OST, out!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 19, 2012 10:17 pm Music from “EVANGELION 3.0” YOU CAN (NOT) REDO OST released on November 28th! http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-1829.html http://www.amazon.co.jp/exec/obidos/ASIN/B009EBE1CY/evafan-22/ref=nosim/

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Fri Oct 19, 2012 10:37 pm Fuck yes, thanks for posting. I'll be making sure to pick this up.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Oct 19, 2012 11:22 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Oct 19, 2012 11:49 pm The only song I'm looking for is 9th Symphony. A full rendition of Thanatos would be cool too. Evanescence movement 3 was missing the happy part.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sat Oct 20, 2012 12:00 am This makes me moist.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Sat Oct 20, 2012 4:06 am Ooooooohhhh yes!

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Oct 20, 2012 5:26 am I fully expect the Q soundtrack to be as eargasmic as the previous two. Perhaps it will have classic-ish music, with the appearance of Kaworu and so. Not sure if the ode to joy will still be in it, I give it 40%, less that 50% because they already seem to have given Rebuild!Kaworu a new musical theme. But yeah, cool. Usually you barely notice the soundtrack while watching, it is integral to contributing to the atmosphere and you may come to recognize recurring pieces, but that's it. Rebuild of Evangelion is one of the few movies/shows that had me going "Man, is thus Music REAL?" several times. As in, something as shocking/surprising as the beast mode scene was gping on, and I was about as flabbergasted by the music as by the picture. So yeah, let's see what they got for us this time!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 20, 2012 11:23 am That Shini and Kaworu poster image is also the CD soundtrack image: http://www.evastore.jp/pc/index.php?toid=PC_ARTICLE&fromid=PC_ARTICLE_NEW_LIST&article_id=10992&category_id=top

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Sat Oct 20, 2012 11:27 am I wonder if we're getting an "Evangelion 3.0" version with the movie cuts of the music. What was the release window on 1.0's two OSTs?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Oct 20, 2012 11:32 am CDJapan's page seems to imply it's gonna be like the 2.0 OST release with bonus tracks and unused tracks included: http://www.cdjapan.co.jp/detailview.html?KEY=KICA-3202

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sat Oct 20, 2012 1:00 pm Terrific. I already know I'm going to listen the shit out of this.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Oct 20, 2012 3:22 pm Very cool news! But man, I can't believe they actually titled a track "Mari Kills Asuka" I gotcha for a second, admit it

[]:             Quote Post by LIwarriorTKD » Sat Oct 20, 2012 5:56 pm Warren Peace wrote: Very cool news! But man, I can't believe they actually titled a track "Mari Kills Asuka" I gotcha for a second, admit it

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Oct 20, 2012 6:12 pm Warren Peace wrote: Very cool news! But man, I can't believe they actually titled a track "Mari Kills Asuka" I gotcha for a second, admit it

[]:             Quote Post by jimmiel » Sat Oct 20, 2012 9:13 pm Warren Peace wrote: Very cool news! But man, I can't believe they actually titled a track "Mari Kills Asuka" I gotcha for a second, admit it

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Oct 20, 2012 9:59 pm jimmiel wrote: You might have had I not remembered all the track titles are in le français now.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sat Oct 20, 2012 10:02 pm jimmiel wrote: Unless I cave and watch a camprip, I'll probably have listened to this soundtrack a dozen times before I ever see the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Oct 20, 2012 10:38 pm With that album art, is #11 such a stretch? And Arianne fans should be on the lookout for #10, since it really could be the title.

[]:             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Sun Oct 21, 2012 6:28 am 11. Voulez-vous Coucher Avec Moi, Kaworu?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Oct 21, 2012 6:47 am ^ Parbleu! Avez-vous besoin de le demander?
